title: mentha × verticillata var. nitida
intro: Mentha × verticillata var. nitida, also known as pineapple mint, is a hybrid plant species within the mint family. This plant is prized for its unique ability to produce a fragrance reminiscent of pineapple due to the presence of certain volatile compounds. The medicinal properties of Mentha × verticillata var. nitida include its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, which can be beneficial in treating digestive issues and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of pineapple mint can be used to create teas, infusions, and topical creams that offer health benefits such as improved digestion, reduced nausea, and relief from headaches.
